alignments.candidate_evidence: Led technical design and requirements definition for global commercial operations transformation programs at Google, with stakeholder alignment and scope definition
alignments.job_requirement: Lead the technical development of system architectures and define requirements for Safety Critical Systems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years scaling global commercial operations with cross-functional stakeholder management, executive reporting, and program delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with internal and external stakeholders; provide regular reporting on project status to Chief Engineering and Programme Management

gaps.gap: No aerospace engineering degree; candidate background is Strategy and Operations, not Aerospace or Electrical Engineering
gaps.mitigation: Role description encourages applying without all qualifications; however, avionics safety-critical systems engineering requires domain-specific technical foundation unlikely to transfer from ops leadership

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience in safety-critical hardware and software development for airborne platforms
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's transformation and operations work does not include avionics systems design, flight control architectures, or vehicle management systems engineering

gaps.gap: No documented knowledge of ARP4754, ARP4761, DO-178C, or DO-254 standards; no civil or military aviation authority relationships
gaps.mitigation: These are specialized certification and compliance standards for aviation systems; candidate has no indicated exposure

gaps.gap: No deep technical knowledge of Guidance Navigation & Control (GNC) or air vehicle management systems
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has no background in avionics, aeronautical engineering, or GNC discipline

gaps.gap: Candidate's technical depth is in business operations transformation and strategic program execution, not systems engineering or avionics integration
gaps.mitigation: Role requires lead technical ownership of HW/SW integration and certification; candidate's expertise is organizational and strategic, not engineering-technical

output.summary: This is a deeply technical avionics systems engineering role requiring aerospace/electrical engineering credentials, hands-on safety-critical HW/SW development experience, and domain mastery of aviation certification standards (ARP4754, ARP4761, DO-178C, DO-254). The candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with no demonstrated aerospace, avionics, or safety-critical systems background. While stakeholder management and program leadership translate partially, the core technical and domain requirements are disqualifying. Role is outside target and stretch families.
